name: foxy-whatsapp-bot
description: 🦊 Foxy Bot — Your all-in-one WhatsApp companion. 100+ commands covering AI, stickers, games, group management, media downloads, and more. One-click deploy, zero setup headaches.

SESSION_ID.description: 🔑 Your WhatsApp session string — paste it here to connect the bot. Get one by running the bot locally first and copying the string from your .env file.

BOT_NAME.description: 🦊 What should your bot call itself? This name shows in menus and greetings. Keep it short and fun!

PREFIX.description: ⚡ The character users type before commands. Popular choices: . ! / # — Default is a dot (.) so commands look like .menu .sticker .ai

OWNER_NUMBER.description: 👑 Your WhatsApp number with full country code — no spaces, no +. Example: 2547XXXXXXXX. You'll get exclusive owner commands like .update and .broadcast

BOT_MODE.description: 🌐 public = anyone can use the bot | private = only you and whitelisted users. Start with public, switch later if needed.

AUTO_READ_STATUS.description: 👁️ Should the bot automatically view everyone's WhatsApp Status? Set to true to enable, false to disable.

scripts.postdeploy: echo '🦊 Foxy Bot deployed! Check your worker dyno with: heroku ps:scale worker=1 -a YOUR_APP_NAME'
